seo.metaTitle: White-Label Professional Logo Design for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Offer professional logo design under your brand. Hostopia's white-label service delivers agency-quality logos to SMBs — no in-house designers required. Full ownership, all formats.

hero.headline: Agency-Quality Logos — Delivered Under Your Brand, Without an Agency
hero.subheadline: Most SMBs DIY their logo or rely on outdated graphics that don't scale across channels. A professional logo becomes the foundation of every digital product they buy from you.
hero.description: Hostopia's white-label Professional Logo Design gives you a managed creative service to resell under your brand. Our designers handle the entire process — from questionnaire to final delivery in 11 formats — while you own the customer relationship and the revenue.
hero.badge: Managed logo design, white-labeled for partners

items.title: Professional design expertise
items.body: Logos created by professional designers through a guided questionnaire that captures their brand vision, values, and audience.

items.title: All formats included
items.body: 11 production-ready file formats — AI, EPS, PNG, JPG, PDF, ICO, and more — for web, print, signage, and social.

items.title: Fast turnaround
items.body: Initial concepts delivered in just a few business days, with structured revision rounds to finalize.

items.title: Full ownership
items.body: The SMB owns the final logo outright. No ongoing licensing fees, no usage restrictions.

features.heading: A Managed Creative Service — Without Managing Creatives
features.intro: You sell the service and own the customer relationship. Hostopia handles the entire design workflow from intake through final delivery.

cards.title: Guided Creative Process
cards.body: A branded questionnaire and coordinator-led workflow captures each SMB's vision, values, and audience — ensuring the design hits the mark without back-and-forth.

cards.title: Production-Ready Deliverables
cards.body: Every logo ships in 11 formats optimized for web, print, signage, and social media. SMBs get files they can use immediately, everywhere.

cards.title: Fast, Structured Workflow
cards.body: Initial concepts in a few business days. Defined revision rounds keep the process efficient and predictable for both you and your customers.

cards.title: Full Rights & Ownership
cards.body: SMBs receive complete ownership of their logo with no licensing fees. Clean IP means they can use it across any channel, any medium, forever.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Open New Revenue Without Hiring Designers
partnerAdvantage.intro: Professional Logo Design is a high-value, low-lift addition to your portfolio — positioning you as the partner that defined their brand, not just their infrastructure.

items.title: Bundle into brand launch packages
items.body: Logo design pairs naturally with domains, business email, and websites. Create 'brand launch' packages that drive multi-product attachment from day one.

items.title: Boost ARPU and deepen relationships
items.body: A high-engagement branding product that anchors SMBs to your platform. Customers who start with a logo are primed to buy the digital services that follow.

items.title: Scale without creative overhead
items.body: Hostopia handles fulfillment, onboarding, and training. You get agency-quality output with zero designer headcount — just sell, bundle, and grow.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Starting Point for Every Digital Journey
lifecycleFit.intro: A professional logo is the first step in building a credible brand. It anchors every product that follows — websites, email, social, storefronts — making it the natural entry point in your digital portfolio.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Professional Logo Design creates the visual identity that anchors domains, email, and every digital touchpoint.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Websites and hosting launch the digital presence built on that brand.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO, directories, and reputation management drive visibility.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Ecommerce, email marketing, and advanced services drive revenue growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position logo design as the entry point that triggers cross-sell into domains, websites, and email. Bundle it into 'brand launch' packages that create multi-product engagements from the first sale.

cta.headline: Ready to Add Professional Logo Design to Your Brand Portfolio?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch white-label logo design, bundle it with your digital and connectivity services, and give SMBs a professional visual identity from day one.
